testcase.name: registerTest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //div[contains(text(),'Your registration completed')] (tried for 15 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '14.0', java.version: '21.0.7' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.153, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.153 (85fd829a1b2..., userDataDir: /var/folders/1c/l0st32kn2z9...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52381}, goog:processID: 15303, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52381/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.153, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 5e7901bbfc0c764d08eb08298cfcfeeb at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at com.framework.tests.RegisterTest.registerTest(RegisterTest.java:45) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ...
